title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: chrony bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for chrony is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.7 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
full_text:
An update for chrony is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.7 Release Notes linked from the References section.
